title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS Developers argues that coding alone is no longer a differentiator for junior cloud engineers. The best juniors should focus on fundamentals like security, reliability, cost, and performance while using AI agents to move faster, with an emphasis on understanding what to build and why rather than implementation details.
